summary: Hero section redesign testing completed. All 15 test cases passed. Hero section renders correctly on both desktop (1920x1080) and mobile (390x844). All required elements present with correct data-testid attributes. LiveMetricsTerminal correctly hidden on mobile. CTA buttons navigate to correct routes (/register and /leaderboard). All other landing page sections still render correctly.
passed_tests: Hero section renders on desktop (1920x1080) with data-testid='hero-section'
Hero overline 'ON-CHAIN VERIFIED PERFORMANCE' visible with data-testid='hero-overline'
Hero title 'AI-Generated Crypto Strategies. Verified On-Chain.' visible with data-testid='hero-title'
Hero description/sub-headline visible with data-testid='hero-description' - mentions AlphaAI, Sharpe ratio, blockchain
Hero micro-copy visible with data-testid='hero-microcopy' - 'Transparent metrics. Immutable records. Built for traders who verify.'
Primary CTA 'Join Free Beta Access (Limited Spots)' visible and clickable with data-testid='cta-join-beta'
Primary CTA links to /register - navigation verified
Secondary CTA 'View Live Metrics' visible and clickable with data-testid='cta-view-metrics'
Secondary CTA links to /leaderboard - navigation verified
Trust line 'No credit card required. Free tier included.' visible with data-testid='hero-trust-line'
Trust bar with 4 items visible (data-testid='trust-bar' with trust-item-0 through trust-item-3)
Trust items: Verified On-Chain, Transparent Metrics, Built for Serious Traders, Zero Hype Real Data
Live Metrics Terminal visible on desktop with data-testid='live-metrics-terminal' showing strategy performance data
Terminal live indicator with pulsing green dot visible with data-testid='terminal-live-indicator' showing 'Live'
Live Metrics Terminal correctly hidden on mobile (screen width < 768px) - md:block class working
Hero section renders correctly on mobile (390x844) - all text elements visible
Other landing page sections still render: missed-vs-captured, timing-gap, todays-signals, social-proof, final-cta, features

test_credentials.demo_mode: ?demo=true URL parameter (not required for landing page)

seed_data_creation: None - landing page is static/client-side rendered
context_for_next_testing_agent: Hero section redesign is complete and working. LiveMetricsTerminal component shows strategy performance metrics (Sharpe Ratio 2.14, Win Rate 68.3%, Max Drawdown -4.2%, etc.) with a pulsing green 'Live' indicator. Terminal is hidden on mobile via 'hidden md:block' class. CTA buttons correctly navigate to /register and /leaderboard. Trust bar shows 4 credibility points with icons. All other landing page sections (missed-vs-captured, timing-gap, todays-signals, social-proof, final-cta, features) still render correctly.
